final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: digital-illustration-fantasy
Asset type: digital painting, wide cinematic illustration
Primary request: a breathtaking deep-sea fantasy world featuring ancient underwater ruins glowing with bioluminescence, inhabited by bizarre deep-sea creatures and a mermaid princess
Scene/backdrop: ocean floor thousands of meters deep, pitch-black abyssal water, ancient sunken civilization ruins — massive stone pillars and arches encrusted with coral and sea anemones, mysterious rune-carved stone stele at center
Subject: mermaid princess in ancient ornate costume examining a rune-inscribed stone stele at the center; surrounding creatures — giant jellyfish emitting blue-violet fluorescence, translucent deep-sea fish with glowing bioluminescent organs, a colossal octopus with tentacles reaching out from the darkness in the background
Style/medium: digital painting, richly detailed fantasy illustration, painterly brushwork
Composition/framing: wide cinematic frame, mid-distance establishing shot with mermaid princess as focal center, layered depth from foreground coral ruins to distant dark abyss
Lighting/mood: bioluminescent glow as primary light source — soft cyan-green, violet, and gold light points scattered throughout; mysterious, dreamlike, awe-inspiring atmosphere; deep darkness punctuated by organic luminescence
Color palette: deep blue-black as dominant base tone, accented with cyan-green bioluminescent glow, purple fluorescence, and scattered gold light particles
Materials/textures: weathered ancient stone with coral overgrowth, translucent jellyfish membrane, iridescent fish scales, flowing mermaid tail fabric with fine detail
Constraints: keep the mermaid princess as the clear focal point; ruins must feel ancient and grand in scale; bioluminescent lighting must be the sole light source
Avoid: bright daylight or surface ocean lighting, cartoonish simplification, flat colors, oversaturated neon without depth
